This study designed 12 novel ⁹⁹ᵐTc-labeled PSMA-targeting SPECT tracers using AuK as the targeting group and HYNIC as the chelator. This study demonstrates efficient radiolabeling of CHX-A99-DTPA-conjugated mAbs (e.g., pertuzumab) with [⁸⁹Zr]ZrCl₄.
